overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a 1960s-era open world game (Mafia III), showing the player character walking through the fictional city of New Bordeaux. The character traverses urban sidewalks and crosses intersections surrounded by period-appropriate architecture, vintage vehicles, and pedestrians in summer clothing under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with brick buildings and vintage parked cars

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a brick building with chain-link fence, approaching an intersection

notable_agents.action: man leaning against fence watching the street
woman in white dress crossing the street ahead

entered.detail: tall brick building with chain-link fence running along the sidewalk
row of multi-story historic brick buildings with storefronts across the street
1960s-era vehicles including a white Volkswagen Beetle parked along the curb
red and blue newspaper vending machines on the sidewalk corner

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit urban sidewalk bordered by a brick building with a chain-link fence on the right. Across the street, historic brick buildings line the road where vintage 1960s cars are parked. A man leans against the fence while a woman crosses the street ahead, and the camera approaches an intersection.

events.description: steps off concrete sidewalk onto asphalt street crosswalk
white vintage car passes through the intersection from left to right

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection while navigating around vehicles and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: white vintage sedan driving through the intersection
woman in blue dress and hat crossing the street in the same direction

entered.detail: wide asphalt intersection with crosswalk markings and manhole covers
overhead traffic signal suspended on wires across the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character steps into a sunlit urban intersection, transitioning from sidewalk to asphalt crosswalk. A white vintage car passes through the intersection while a woman in a blue dress crosses alongside. The overhead traffic lights are visible against the clear sky as the character navigates across the open street.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with shipping warehouse and wooden residential houses

events.description: ego slightly adjusts path to avoid oncoming pedestrian then continues forward

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk passing the Louisiana Shipping Co building and colorful wooden houses

notable_agents.action: man in green shirt walking toward the camera on the sidewalk
group of three women standing and conversing on the street corner

entered.detail: large dark industrial building with 'LOUISIANA SHIPPING CO' painted signage on the facade
traditional colorful wooden houses with porches and white trim
white wooden picket fence running along the front yards of the houses
red fire hydrant on the sidewalk near the corner

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sidewalk bordered by the large Louisiana Shipping Co warehouse on the left and colorful wooden shotgun houses with white picket fences on the right. The character passes a red fire hydrant and navigates around pedestrians walking in the opposite direction while vintage cars drive by on the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with multiple pedestrians and vehicles

events.description: approaches street corner and steps into intersection to cross the road
pauses briefly for white convertible to pass before continuing to cross

agents.ego_description: crossing the second intersection alongside other pedestrians while watching for traffic

notable_agents.action: woman in gray dress walking alongside ego across the street
white convertible car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: two-story green wooden building on the corner with large windows
asphalt intersection with crosswalk lines and traffic signals

segments.scene_description: The character reaches a busy intersection and steps onto the asphalt crosswalk to cross the street. A woman in a gray dress walks alongside while a white convertible passes through the intersection. The green corner building and various parked cars line the streets as pedestrians move in multiple directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with green wooden storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past green wooden buildings and a child standing near the curb

notable_agents.action: child standing on the sidewalk near the building entrance
man in hat and suspenders walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: green painted wooden buildings with large display windows at street level
tall curved street lamp post on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along a sidewalk lined with green wooden storefronts featuring large windows. A child stands near a building entrance on the right while other pedestrians walk ahead. The street lamp and overhead wires are visible against the bright midday sky as the character proceeds down the urban street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit urban district, transitioning from a residential brick corridor into a bustling commercial street. It begins along a sidewalk bordered by a chain-link fence and historic brick buildings, moving steadily toward a bright intersection where a white vintage car passes. As the character crosses the asphalt, the scene shifts to a stretch of road flanked by the large Louisiana Shipping Co warehouse and colorful wooden shotgun houses with white picket fences. The camera then navigates through another busy crosswalk past a green corner building and a white convertible before turning toward a row of green wooden storefronts. Finally, the movement continues past large display windows and pedestrians under a bright midday sky crisscrossed by overhead wires.
